$schema_note: Pass-2 harvest by MisconceptionAnalyst from common_miss in data/buckets/verb_form.passato_remoto.json. PENDING ratification. Uses families ratified in thread v2; new specifics defined here, reused ones under reuses_existing. Thread: inter_chat/Architecture_MisconceptionAnalyst_registry_harvest.md.

proposed_family_actions.note: The rhizotonic strong-stem / arrhizotonic alternation of the passato remoto.

proposed_misconceptions.proposed_label: Strong passato-remoto stem used in the weak persons
proposed_misconceptions.proposed_description: Carrying the strong (rhizotonic) stem into the 2sg/1pl/2pl, which take the regular weak stem and endings.
proposed_misconceptions.cross_kind_note: Over-application shape, like the present stem-change over-extensions; the inverse (regularising the strong persons, prendei for presi) maps to regularisation.irregular_verb.

reuses_existing.note: parlo for parlò, dormi for dormì: dropping the obligatory final-stress accent.
prendei for presi, avei for ebbi, facei for feci: regularising the strong/suppletive passato remoto.
avevo parlato (pluperfect) for ebbi parlato: wrong tense of the auxiliary.
